nasb.text: Every day Mordecai walked back and forth in front of the court of the harem to learn how Esther was and how she fared.

esv.text: And every day Mordecai walked in front of the court of the harem to learn how Esther was and what was happening to her.

cnv.text: 末底改天天都在女院的院子前面徘徊，要知道以斯帖平安不平安，她的情形怎樣。

ccb.text: 末底改天天在女宫的庭院前徘徊，好打听以斯帖的消息，了解她的情况。
